changeSet.author: system
changeSet.sql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_land_covers_sheet_parcel ON land_covers (sheet_id, parcel_id);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_data_layer_type_id ON data_layer (data_layer_type_id);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_data_layer_type_metadata_type ON data_layer (data_layer_type_id, (metadata->>'type'));
